text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen still looking unlikely,
a dismal mood has fallen over the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Big Brother. I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Big Sister. I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but her smile looks empty. It must
still be bothering her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz... buzz...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Not far!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Where in the world could Rice Shower be going?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Was that Rice Shower that just ran by?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I-I think so. She looked really intense. You don't
think—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: S-stop! She's always working so hard, so don't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I race up the stairs. Please tell me this pit in the
bottom of my stomach is totally unfounded!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please... ask them to let us use the course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tear across the corridor toward her voice.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Patience! There are certain procedures that must
be followed before I—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I've already asked the Hanshin staff! And the
Kyoto staff too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So please... save the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Astonishment! Now Trainer
<username> is here too?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I came to ask the director for something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking we could hold the Takarazuka
Kinen at the Kyoto Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! She asked just last night as well, if
memory serves.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Alas! It is not my decision to make. We must first
contact—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but I told you—I've already contacted the
Hanshin and Kyoto Racecourses!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to cause you trouble, and I know it's not
easy, but please help us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Please, please, please! I want to do everything I
possibly can for all the people who have
supported me up until now!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-now, now... Let's all calm dow—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: S-sorry for the delay! I have good news!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Tazuna! My savior!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This year's Takarazuka Kinen will be held at the
Kyoto Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Both the Hanshin and Kyoto Racecourses'
staff have been talking to each other behind the
scenes. They're determined to make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They're giving it their all for this race... and for
you, Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hic... I'm so glad... that they're holding the race.
choice_data_list: Now it's your turn to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Yeah! Not just for me, but for everyone
who's working hard to make this happen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And for everyone who's supported me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in the Takarazuka Kinen... and
make everyone smile!
